description: diagnostic navigator and screen descriptor probes

probes.js: var proto = Object.getPrototypeOf(navigator); var d = proto && Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(proto, 'userAgent'); return !!d && typeof d.get === 'function' && d.set === undefined;
var proto = Object.getPrototypeOf(navigator); var d = proto && Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(proto, 'language'); return !!d && typeof d.get === 'function' && d.set === undefined;
var proto = Object.getPrototypeOf(navigator); var d = proto && Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(proto, 'languages'); return !!d && typeof d.get === 'function' && d.set === undefined;
var proto = Object.getPrototypeOf(navigator); var d = proto && Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(proto, 'webdriver'); return d === undefined || (typeof d.get === 'function' && d.set === undefined);
var proto = Object.getPrototypeOf(screen); var d = proto && Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(proto, 'width'); return !!d && typeof d.get === 'function' && d.set === undefined;
var proto = Object.getPrototypeOf(screen); var d = proto && Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(proto, 'height'); return !!d && typeof d.get === 'function' && d.set === undefined;
var proto = Object.getPrototypeOf(navigator); return !!proto && proto !== Object.prototype && Object.prototype.isPrototypeOf.call(Object.prototype, proto);
var proto = Object.getPrototypeOf(screen); return !!proto && proto !== Object.prototype && Object.prototype.isPrototypeOf.call(Object.prototype, proto);
